title: Feast Preparation Flow
description: End-to-end planning flow for biblical/seasonal feasts: select feast, plan menus, schedule sessions across domains, and stabilize cleanup and preservation afterward.
objectives: Help the household choose a feast, dates, and guest count with clarity.
Translate feast requirements into balanced menus, task lists, and sessions.
Align storehouse, garden, and animals with feast needs ahead of time.
Coordinate cooking, preservation, and cleaning sessions before and after the feast.
Reduce stress day-of by pre-scheduling as much work as possible into earlier sessions.

entryCriteria.description: When to consider activating this feast preparation flow.

exitCriteria.description: When feast preparation is considered complete for this cycle.

nowCtaBehavior.description: How the 'Now' button should behave when this flow is active.

feast_selection_and_scope.label: Feast Selection & Scope
feast_selection_and_scope.goal: Identify which feast, its dates, observance level, and who will attend.

steps.label: Select Feast & Dates
steps.description: Choose the feast, confirm calendar dates, and connect to household calendar entries.
steps.nowCtaHint: If no feast is selected and a feast day is approaching, suggest this first.

steps.label: Set Guest Count & Roles
steps.description: Estimate how many people will attend each feast day and specify host vs. guest roles.
steps.nowCtaHint: Guest count drives portions, seating, and cleaning requirements.

steps.label: Define Budget & Constraints
steps.description: Capture budget, time constraints, and dietary limits to shape recipe and session choices.
steps.nowCtaHint: Helps limit stress by aligning expectations with resources.

menu_planning_and_scheduling.label: Menu Planning & Schedule
menu_planning_and_scheduling.goal: Design feast menus and map them into day-by-day sessions.

steps.label: Plan Feast Menu
steps.description: Select dishes for each feast day (and night) including mains, sides, breads, and drinks.
steps.nowCtaHint: Core planning step; should appear early once feast and guest count are set.

steps.label: Import or Link Recipes
steps.description: Attach imported recipes or household favorites to each menu item so sessions can be generated.
steps.nowCtaHint: Link recipes to enable cooking sessions and shopping lists.

steps.label: Audit Storehouse for Feast Requirements
steps.description: Compare planned recipes against current inventory to identify feast-specific gaps and surpluses.
steps.nowCtaHint: Highlight critical ingredients and save time before shopping.

steps.label: Generate Feast Shopping List
steps.description: Create a focused shopping list, grouped by store section and priority.
steps.nowCtaHint: Top candidate when you are heading out to shop or placing an order.

steps.label: Schedule Prep & Cooking Sessions
steps.description: Break menu tasks into pre-feast, day-of, and post-feast cooking and preparation sessions.
steps.nowCtaHint: Enables the SessionRunner to surface the right 'Now' options at the right time.

pre_feast_preparation_sessions.label: Pre-Feast Preparation Sessions
pre_feast_preparation_sessions.goal: Spread feast workload into earlier days using preservation, baking, and make-ahead dishes.

steps.label: Run Make-Ahead Cooking Session
steps.description: Batch cook dishes and components that hold well (stocks, breads, sauces, braises).
steps.nowCtaHint: Shown when an open block of time appears in the days before the feast.

steps.label: Run Preservation Session for Feast Ingredients
steps.description: Prepare preserved items (broths, pickles, ferments, frozen components) ahead of time.
steps.nowCtaHint: Especially relevant when garden or animal harvests are tied to the feast menu.

steps.label: Align Garden Harvest with Feast
steps.description: Plan harvest days and quantities for feast-specific produce (greens, herbs, specialty crops).
steps.nowCtaHint: Use when fresh garden items are part of the menu to reduce last-minute stress.

steps.label: Plan Animal Butchery & Meat Yield
steps.description: If feast meat comes from your animals, plan butchery timing, yields, and preservation.
steps.nowCtaHint: Enable meat breakdown and preservation sessions to be scheduled well before the feast.

steps.label: Prepare Dining & Serving Areas
steps.description: Run a cleaning and layout session to prepare tables, chairs, and serving zones ahead of time.
steps.nowCtaHint: Offer this a few days before the feast when guests will use the space.

day_of_execution.label: Day-of Feast Execution
day_of_execution.goal: Guide the household through feast day cooking, serving, and light reset with minimal chaos.

steps.label: Run Feast Day Cooking Session
steps.description: Orchestrate all feast dishes using a guided multi-step SessionRunner with timers and cues.
steps.nowCtaHint: On feast day, this should be the top 'Now' option during main prep windows.

steps.label: Service & Staging Checklist
steps.description: Use a light checklist session for setting out dishes, utensils, drinks, and seating.
steps.nowCtaHint: Recommended shortly before guests arrive or the feast time begins.

steps.label: Light Reset Between Meals
steps.description: Short sessions to clear dishes, reset surfaces, and prepare for the next round of serving.
steps.nowCtaHint: Suggested between major meal times to keep overwhelm down.

post_feast_reset.label: Post-Feast Reset & Preservation
post_feast_reset.goal: Gently return the home and storehouse to a stable state and preserve leftovers wisely.

steps.label: Inventory Leftovers & Surplus
steps.description: Quickly log leftover dishes and ingredients to decide what to preserve, freeze, or share.
steps.nowCtaHint: Prompt this soon after the feast to prevent waste.

steps.label: Run Leftover Preservation Session
steps.description: Use a guided session to portion, package, and freeze or preserve suitable leftovers.
steps.nowCtaHint: High priority when large amounts of food remain after the feast.

steps.label: Run Post-Feast Deep Cleaning Session
steps.description: Commit to a focused cleaning session for kitchen, dining, and common areas used during the feast.
steps.nowCtaHint: May be split into multiple shorter sessions if energy is low.

steps.label: Capture Notes & Gratitude
steps.description: Record what went well, what to adjust next time, and any meaningful moments from the feast.
steps.nowCtaHint: Helps improve future feasts and preserve the joy, not just the logistics.
